name: Jelly Cake Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Prepare a jelly roll pan with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
4. In another mixing bowl, beat egg whites into soft peaks. Gradually sprinkle in 1/3 cup granulated sugar, beating until the sugar is completely dissolved and stiff peaks form.
5. Beat egg yolks until thick and lemon-colored. At the same speed, gradually sprinkle in the remaining granulated sugar and vanilla.
6. Sprinkle the flour mixture over the egg yolks; add the beaten egg whites. With a rubber spatula, gently fold the mixture to blend thoroughly.
7. Spread the batter in the pan.
8. Bake for 15 minutes.
9. Meanwhile, sprinkle a cloth towel with powdered sugar.
10. Immediately invert the hot cake onto the towel; gently remove the waxed paper.
11. While still warm, carefully roll up the cake and towel from the narrow end.
12. Cool the cake completely on a rack.
13. Unroll the cake and spread with jam or other filling.
14. Re-roll without the towel and sprinkle the roll with powdered sugar.
15. Chill.
